title: Gampang Cuan
overview: Sultan, Bilqis, and Aji suddenly inherit an unusual legacy from their father: A FREAKING DEBT! These three siblings must put their heads together to make as much money as possible, exploring methods that range from borderline unethical to diving into unfamiliar territory they've never known before. Not only that! Back in their hometown, their mother knows nothing about their struggles abroad.
